text.title: csharp-dotnet Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for csharp-dotnet. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Every async controller action MUST accept CancellationToken as the last parameter and thread it to the service layer.
rule.rationale: Without token plumbing, client disconnects and timeouts do not cancel database queries, causing thread-pool starvation under load.
